title: GraalVM Python Interpreter
summary: GraalVM has a Python interpreter you can install which enables you to run Python programs on GraalVM or execute Python from within your Java code. This short tutorial explains how to install the GraalVM Python interpreter - and how to run a Python program from the command line.
content:
GraalVM has a Python interpreter you can install which enables you to run Python programs on
                GraalVM or execute Python from within your Java code. This short tutorial explains how to install the
                GraalVM Python interpreter - and how to run a Python program from the command line.
